title: geofencing — settings
description: Tenant-facing geofence preferences. Branch-level fence config (polygon, radius, tolerance, enforcement toggle) is EDITED VIA THE FACILITIES MODULE'S BRANCH CRUD — not here. This surface covers tenant-wide defaults + retention.

groups.label: Geofencing
groups.description: Tenant-wide defaults for point-in-polygon evaluation + retention.

sections.label: Defaults
sections.description: Values used when a branch row doesn't specify its own.

fields.name: default_accuracy_tolerance_m
fields.label: Default accuracy tolerance (m)
fields.helpText: Reject GPS readings noisier than this. Consumer sees SKIPPED.

fields.name: default_radius_m
fields.label: Default radius (m)
fields.helpText: Used when a branch has no polygon.

sections.label: Retention
sections.description: How long evaluation audit rows persist. Non-override rows configurable; override rows fixed to 10 years.

fields.name: retention_years
fields.label: Retention (years)
fields.helpText: Minimum 3 years to meet US FLSA. Maximum 25 to cap storage costs.

sections.label: Enforcement
sections.description: Master toggle for the enforcement UX. When off, evaluations still record on the audit log but consumers ignore the OUTSIDE verdict — useful for shadow-mode deployments.

fields.name: notify_admins_on_override_request
fields.label: Email tenant admins when an override is requested
